chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET ELECTION APPELLATE TRIBUNAL SUKKUR. (BEFORE MR. JUSTICE IRSHAD ALI SHAH) Election Appeal No.S-08 of 2024 (Siraj Ahmed Vs Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 23/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case. 08-01-2024. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar advocate for the appellant. Mr. Dareshani Ali Hyder “Ada” DAG, Pakistan. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi Assistant Director (Law) ECP. ******** 1. Deferred. 2. The appellant by way of instant appeal has impugned the order of the Returning Officer whereby his nomination paper to contest election from PS-24 (Sukkur-III) has been rejected for the reason that he has failed to declare the value of assets. If Returning Officer was having a feeling that the declaration of the value of the property was necessary then, she ought to have provided a chance to the appellant to do the needful as is prescribed by section 62 (d) (ii) of Election Act-2017. The right to contest election could not be denied for technical reasons. As such the impugned order could not be sustained; consequently the nomination paper of the appellant shall be deemed to have been accepted. The instant Election Appeal is disposed of accordingly. Judge/Appellate Tribunal Nasim/P.A
